## Summary

- describe the user-facing change
- note any public API or visual changes

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Release Notes

- [ ] Added a changeset because the published package changed
- [ ] No changeset needed because this PR is repo-only or demo-only

## Screenshots / Notes

- include screenshots for UI changes when helpful
- call out follow-up work or known tradeoffs
